title: Izal Waz

{{Quote|As far as I'm concerned, you still look more like a bounty hunter than a Jedi Knight.|Han Solo|<ref name="Recovery" />}}
[[Izal Waz]] was a sharp-tongued [[Salt/Legends|salt]]-addicted [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Biography==
===Jedi training===
While training on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] under [[Kenth Hamner]], Waz developed a salt addiction after eating some [[nerfloaf]] that was served by Hamner. He then went on a salt binge, consuming months worth of salt in only a number of days. He fled the [[Jedi Praxeum|Praxeum]] after less than four months.

===The Yuuzhan Vong War===
{{Quote|Hey—look at this! I'm a hero!|Izal Waz|<ref name="Star by Star" />}}
Waz was trained by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Eelysa]], who eventually helped him overcome his salt addiction. Some two years into the war, he served as a member of [[Saba Sebatyne]]'s [[Wild Knights]] squadron. While among them he learned to speak the [[Barabel (language)|Barabel]] and constructed his own [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

Prior to the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], while [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was recovering from her injuries received on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], Waz aided [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in escaping from a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] medical station with Eelysa. Waz was [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Sureshot]]'', and flew his ship until it was sacrificed returning to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The ship was destroyed by [[Space mine/Legends|orbital mines]].

As the conflict against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] wore on, Waz participated in key battles at [[Froz]], [[Reecee/Legends|Reecee]], [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]], [[Talfaglio]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], and [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. He made a key contribution to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] with the invention of the [[glowball]]. Using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to gather light together, he created a globe within which the Jedi fighters could be protected. The technique required his concentration, but was vital in enabling the Wild Knights to gather data on how [[yammosk]]s worked.

===The Dark Nest===
Six years after the war, Waz was one of many Jedi siding with [[Kyp Durron]] during the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]]-[[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] conflict. He volunteered to fly a [[StealthX]] in a mission designed to rescue Jedi Master [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and Han Solo, who were being held prisoner by the Killiks. As the StealthX wing prepared to take off, acting head of the order [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and his allies entered the hanger to stop them. Waz watched as Horn cut through the landing gear on Durron's ship, preventing him from taking off. Waz was impressed with Horn's move, and commented that he had not thought Horn had that in him. Fellow Jedi Knight [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] told him to hold off on any zingers right now, lest they make the situation worse. Solo and [[Zekk]] suggested they join Durron in his argument with Horn and his followers, but leave their lightsabers behind in their cockpits to help sooth tensions and prevent any fights from breaking out. Waz joined the rest of the squadron in backing up Durron, and argued that the Jedi had a duty to choose peace over convenience, even if it meant going against the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] interests.<ref name="Unseen Queen">''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''</ref>

===Rising Tensions===
{{Quote|All through your life you fulfilled your duties with strength, grace, and honor, and we will remember.|Waz, giving Master Hamner's eulogy|<ref name="Conviction">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]''</ref>}}
In [[44 ABY]], Waz was one of several veteran Jedi pilots to help lead the [[StealthX]] wing to aid Luke Skywalker and [[Ben Skywalker]] in their fight against the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]] and [[Abeloth]].<ref name="Vortex">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]''</ref> Later he pronounced an eulogy during the [[Funeral of Kenth Hamner|funeral]] of his former master Kenth Hamner, who had been killed in a [[Skirmish in the Operations Hangar|duel]] with Master [[Saba Sebatyne]] after being deposed as acting [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] by the rest of the [[Jedi High Council (New Jedi Order)|Jedi Council]]. Waz was filled with sorrow over what had happened, and after he finished the eulogy, he lit the funeral pyre of his late master.<ref name="Conviction" />

A few months later, Waz infiltrated [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], which had been secretly taken over by the Lost Tribe of Sith, alongside hundreds of other Jedi to begin liberating it. After Jedi Master [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] assassinated [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith Master]] [[Jestat Vhool]], Waz picked him up on a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] and entered the busy Coruscant traffic lanes, heading towards their second target. After the assassinations were finished, Waz joined Master Sebatyne in leading a group of younger Jedi Knights in hunting down any remaining Sith that did not retreat into the captured [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].<ref name="Apocalypse">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]''</ref>

==Powers and abilities==
Waz was known to make use of a technique that he called a "Glowball". It was a ball of light that he used to cover his and allied ships while in space combat. Used during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it helped the all Jedi squadron led by Saba Sebatyne. He also once used this technique to disguise a large block of durasteel.
